hero.tagline: Smash-style burgers made with local beef, fresh-baked buns, and zero compromises. Lisbon's favourite fast-casual.

about.body:
We started Gutsy because we were tired of bad burgers. Thin patties, soggy buns, mystery meat — we said no thanks.

Every Gutsy burger is made with 100% local beef, smashed to order on a screaming hot griddle, and served on a fresh bun baked down the street. Simple. Honest. Delicious.

items.title: Smash Style
items.description: Pressed thin on a screaming hot griddle for maximum crust and flavour in every bite.

items.title: Local Beef
items.description: 100% Portuguese beef sourced from local farms. No fillers, no freezing, ever.

items.title: Fresh Buns Daily
items.description: Our brioche buns are baked every morning by a local bakery just around the corner.

items.title: Fast & Fresh
items.description: Ready in under 10 minutes. Hot, fresh, and built to order — every single time.

items.title: Fast Delivery
items.description: Order online or via Glovo and Uber Eats. Hot to your door, faster than you think.

items.title: House Specials
items.description: Unique sauces, thick shakes, and loaded fries you won't find anywhere else in the city.

reviews.subtitle: Real feedback from real burger fans.

items.quote: Best burger in Lisbon, hands down. The smash technique makes all the difference — that crust is incredible.
items.name: Ana P.

items.quote: I've been coming every week since they opened. The Smoky burger is absolutely unreal. Never gets old.
items.name: Miguel R.

items.quote: Finally, proper American-style smash burgers in Portugal. Gutsy absolutely nailed it. Worth every cent.
items.name: Tom H.

items.quote: Perfect for a quick lunch. Always fresh, always hot, always exactly what you want from a burger joint.
items.name: Sofia M.

items.quote: The loaded fries alone are worth the trip. I don't know what they put in that cheese sauce but I need more.
items.name: Pedro C.

items.quote: Great vibe, great food, great price. This is our go-to Friday night spot. The milkshakes are dangerous.
items.name: Mariana L.

items.question: Do you offer delivery?
items.answer: Yes! Order directly on our site or through Glovo and Uber Eats. We deliver within a 5km radius of our restaurant.

items.question: Are there vegetarian options?
items.answer: Absolutely. Our Fungi Burger features a plant-based patty and all the same bold toppings. Delicious without the beef.

items.question: Can I book a table?
items.answer: Walk-ins are always welcome. For groups of 6 or more, we recommend calling ahead so we can reserve the right space for you.

items.question: What are your opening hours?
items.answer: Monday to Thursday 12pm–10pm, Friday and Saturday 12pm–11pm, Sunday 12pm–9pm. Kitchen closes 30 minutes before closing.

items.question: Do you cater events?
items.answer: Yes! We handle group orders and private events. Get in touch via our contact form and we'll sort out the details.

items.question: Are your ingredients always fresh?
items.answer: Always. We prep fresh every single day and never freeze our patties. If we run out, we run out — that's the deal.

contact.body: Got a question, a big order, or just want to say hi? Reach out — we're friendly.

footer.tagline: Smash burgers made with local beef and zero compromises.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Fresh patties, local beef, baked-daily buns — built to order

items.name: The OG
items.description: Double smash patty, American cheese, special sauce, pickles, white onion

items.name: Gutsy Classic
items.description: Single patty, lettuce, tomato, red onion, mustard, ketchup

items.name: The Smoky
items.description: Double patty, bacon, smoked cheddar, BBQ sauce, crispy fried onions

items.name: Fungi Burger
items.description: Sautéed mushrooms, Swiss cheese, truffle mayo, rocket — plant-based patty available

items.name: Spicy Diablo
items.description: Double patty, jalapeños, pepper jack, sriracha mayo, pickled red onion

items.name: Smash Fries
items.description: Double-fried crispy fries with house seasoning and sea salt

items.name: Loaded Fries
items.description: Crispy fries with cheese sauce, bacon bits and spring onion

items.name: Onion Rings
items.description: Beer-battered rings with chipotle dipping sauce

items.name: Coleslaw
items.description: House-made with apple cider dressing and fresh herbs

items.name: Thick Milkshake
items.description: Vanilla, chocolate or strawberry — blended thick the way it should be

items.name: Craft Beer
items.description: Local rotating tap selection, always fresh

items.name: House Lemonade
items.description: Fresh-squeezed with mint, served over ice

items.name: Craft Soda
items.description: Cola, ginger beer or sparkling lemon

items.name: Churro Bites
items.description: Warm cinnamon churros with dulce de leche dipping sauce

items.name: Brownie
items.description: Warm dark chocolate brownie with a scoop of vanilla ice cream

items.name: Shake & Brownie
